results.title: Unconjugated bilirubin efflux by bovine brain microvascular endothelial cells in vitro.
results.abstract: The passage of unconjugated bilirubin (UCB) across the blood-brain barrier into the central nervous system is a crucial first step in the development of kernicterus. The objective of the current study was to characterize the passage of UCB across primary bovine brain microvascular endothelial cell (BBMVEC) monolayers in vitro.
results.journal: Pediatric critical care medicine : a journal of the Society of Critical Care Medicine and the World Federation of Pediatric Intensive and Critical Care Societies
